architecture: player chat -> Mindcraft adapter -> SSH tunnel -> remote LoRA gateway -> command allowlist -> Mindcraft execution

verified_responses.result: executed once and returned inventory information
executed and displayed the dynamic block result

verified_responses.user: search for an oak tree again

verified_responses.output: Hello! What can I help with?

safety.allowlist: Only the verified command strings and approved greeting are executable or returned.
safety.unknown_command_example: !hello is blocked and never reaches Mindcraft.
safety.repeat_prevention: Only a final new player message triggers LoRA inference; command results do not retrigger the same request.
